## Pull Request Checklist

Please ensure your contribution meets the following criteria:

- [ ] Added only one resource
- [ ] Link is HTTPS and working
- [ ] Description is one sentence, starts with capital letter, ends with period
- [ ] No marketing language in description
- [ ] Added to the correct category
- [ ] Entry is in alphabetical order within its category
- [ ] If new category: has at least 5 items

## Description

Please briefly describe what you've added and why it's a valuable resource for the awesome-artisan community.

## Resource Details

**Resource Name:** [Name of the resource]

**Category:** [Category it's added to]

**Link:** [URL to the resource]
